steps.title: Identify the contrast requirement
steps.content: The student wants to contrast the two refuges—to highlight what distinguishes them. Contrasts are introduced by words like “while” or “whereas.”

steps.title: Apply the requirement
steps.content:
Choice C uses “While” to present geographic differences between the two refuges—Florida/Atlantic coast versus California/Pacific coast. Choice B instead highlights a similarity (both protect endangered species); choices A and D don't even compare the two refuges.
That matches choice C — C is correct.
